message:
chore(beads): add issue tracker history snapshot 2026-02-16T14:08

Periodic br sync snapshot capturing current issue state for the beads_rust
issue tracker. These JSONL history files provide an audit trail of issue
lifecycle transitions and are used by br tooling for cross-session continuity.
